absolute_end_time_for_entitlement_in_ms_: Absolute end time for entitlement in ms since epoch
absolute_new_expiry_time_in_ms_since_epo: Absolute new expiry time in ms since epoch
array_of_offerings_each_with_identifier_: Array of offerings, each with identifier, description, and packages[]
custom_start_time_in_ms_since_epoch: Custom start time in ms since epoch
customer_object_returned_by_create_purch: Customer object returned by create_purchase (when present in the response)
grant_a_promotional_entitlement_to_a_cus: Grant a promotional entitlement to a customer for support or a campaign.
identifier_of_the_offering_presented_to_: Identifier of the offering presented to the user
integrate_revenuecat_into_the_workflow_m: Integrate RevenueCat into the workflow. Manage subscribers, entitlements, offerings, and Google Play subscriptions. Retrieve customer subscription status, grant or revoke promotional entitlements, record purchases, update subscriber attributes, and manage Google Play subscription billing.
json_object_of_subscriber_attributes_use: JSON object of subscriber attributes (used by update_subscriber_attributes and create_purchase)
look_up_a_customer_in_revenuecat_and_rep: Look up a customer in RevenueCat and report their active entitlements.
offering_identifier_shown_to_the_user: Offering identifier shown to the user
operation_metadata_for_get_customer_app_: Operation metadata. For get_customer: app_user_id, first_seen, active_entitlements, active_subscriptions. For list_offerings: count, current_offering_id.
optional_absolute_end_time_in_ms_since_e: Optional absolute end time in ms since epoch
optional_start_time_in_ms_since_epoch: Optional start time in ms since epoch
product_id_or_store_transaction_id_for_r: Product ID, or store transaction ID for refunds (e.g., GPA.3309-9122-6177-45730)
product_identifier_or_store_transaction_: Product identifier (or store transaction ID for refunds)
refund_and_revoke_a_google_play_subscrip: Refund and revoke a Google Play subscription for a customer support request.
store_receipt_or_purchase_token_e_g_sub: Store receipt or purchase token (e.g., sub_...)
subscriber_object_first_seen_original_ap: Subscriber object (first_seen, original_app_user_id, original_purchase_date, management_url, subscriptions, entitlements, non_subscriptions)
unix_epoch_ms_used_by_revenuecat_to_reso: Unix epoch ms used by RevenueCat to resolve attribute conflicts
unix_epoch_ms_used_to_resolve_attribute_: Unix epoch ms used to resolve attribute conflicts
update_revenuecat_subscriber_attributes_: Update RevenueCat subscriber attributes to power targeting and analytics.
whether_this_is_a_restore_purchase: Whether this is a restore purchase
